## Overview

Equal Experts is a UK-headquartered, network-based consulting firm engaging c. 4,000+ associates across 5 continents. The firm operates a network model rather than a traditional employee-based consultancy: associates are independent specialists who work on engagements through Equal Experts. Strong public sector focus in the UK; ranked #3 G-Cloud supplier by sales volume historically. Largest current public sector engagement: HMRC Multichannel Digital Tax Platform. As a comparator for ArcKit Consulting, Equal Experts demonstrates the network-based scalability model — useful structural inspiration for the associate panel (BR-003) but at much larger scale.

## Products & Services

- **Software engineering** — full-stack engineering teams.
- **Cloud and platform engineering** — multi-cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP).
- **Data and AI** — data engineering, ML platforms.
- **Architecture and design** — including enterprise architecture services.
- **Continuous delivery and DevOps** — pipeline engineering, SRE.
- **Public sector engagement** — HMRC, NHS, GDS, multiple departments.

## Pricing Model

- Day-rate / fixed-price (not publicly transparent at firm level; engagement-by-engagement pricing typical).
- Network-of-associates means flexible scaling but the firm takes a margin layer over associate rates.

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: Yes — top-3 G-Cloud supplier by sales historically.
- DOS listed: Yes (Equal Experts is a DOS specialist and outcomes supplier).
- AWS Partner: Yes ([Equal Experts on AWS Partners](https://partners.amazonaws.com/partners/001E000001OMOf7IAH/Equal%20Experts)).
- Google Cloud Partner: Yes ([Equal Experts on Google Cloud Find a Partner](https://cloud.google.com/find-a-partner/partner/equal-experts-uk-ltd)).
- Public sector focus: Strong — historically £54m in government contracts on the digital framework cited as one of the company's revenue points.
- UK data centres: UK-resident operations.

## Strengths

- **Top-3 G-Cloud supplier by sales** — proven framework participation at scale.
- **Network model** scales without the fixed-cost overhead of an employee-based firm — relevant inspiration for ArcKit Consulting's associate panel (BR-003).
- **Multi-cloud capability** — AWS, GCP, Azure partner status; broad capability footprint.
- **Strong public sector engagement** — HMRC platform engagement is one of the largest UK public sector technology programmes.
- **Mature** — founded 2007; over 17 years operating.
- **Global reach** with associates across 5 continents — useful for clients needing time-zone coverage.

## Weaknesses

- **Network model commercial complexity** — IR35 status determination, prompt-payment cascade, conflict-of-interest checks, all more complex at network scale.
- **No explicit SME-tier commitment visible in public communications** — Equal Experts serves enterprise / public sector clients at scale, not specifically SME suppliers.
- **Less brand recognition for SME-focused EA work** — reputation is for engineering / DevOps / platform, less for principles / requirements / governance work.

## Comparison to ArcKit Consulting Positioning

| Dimension | Equal Experts | ArcKit Consulting (Target) |
|-----------|---------------|---------------------------|
| Legal vehicle | Network-of-associates Ltd | Ltd → B-Corp (year 2) |
| Geographic | 5 continents | UK (with potential associate distribution) |
| Public sector focus | Strong (top-3 G-Cloud) | 100% |
| Operating model | Network of independent associates | Hybrid: substantively employed core + associate panel for surge |
| Engagement focus | Engineering / DevOps / platform | Principles / requirements / governance / EA advisory |
| Transparent rate card | Limited public | Yes (commitment) |
| SME-tier commitment | No | Yes (Principle 1) |
| Scale | ~4,000+ associates | 10–30 employees + 5–15 associates (target year 3) |

## Strategic Inspiration

Equal Experts demonstrates that a network-of-associates model can scale to top-3 G-Cloud supplier rank. Practical learnings for ArcKit Consulting's associate panel design (BR-003):

- **Predictable work and prompt payment** are the two most-cited associate pain points across UK consulting market — Equal Experts has built a reputation on these.
- **Clear scoping and IR35 discipline** — the network model only works at scale if IR35, conflict of interest, and quality standards are operationally consistent.
- **Capability matrix discipline** — finding the right associate for the right engagement at scale needs structured matching (FR-005).
